body.title: Add blocked_by field to goal schema — explicit 'not doing' record
body.result: Added /goal block command and blocked_by field to /goal skill
body.description:
When a goal is intentionally not pursued yet (e.g. Gmail blocked until Igor can self-configure), that decision has no home and the same conversation recurs. Add blocked_by to the goal schema so 'not doing' is as explicit as 'doing'.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/goal/SKILL.md (add /goal block command)
**Design rules:** palace-first; blocked_by stored as metadata field on the palace.goals.* node
**Scope boundary:** in scope: /goal block G-xxx --until G-yyy (stores blocked_by=G-yyy on the node); /goal list shows blocked goals with unlock condition; /audit-goal flags goals blocked by already-achieved goals. Out of scope: auto-unblocking when unlock condition is met.
**Test plan:** manual smoke: block a goal, verify it shows in list with unlock condition, verify audit-goal surfaces it when blocker is achieved.
